name: Mornington Peninsula Chocolates
signature: Handmade chocolates, rich hot chocolates, and a small café — a reliable family stop with enough seasonal stock to justify the detour
editorNote:
Mornington Peninsula Chocolates is the sweet stop you slot into a Flinders or hinterland loop without planning to and somehow spend forty minutes in. The chocolates are handmade, the hot chocolate is the real thing, and the small café at the front holds enough seasonal stock — Easter, Mother's Day, Christmas — to justify a return visit or three across a year.

It is unpretentious and built for families. The kids get a treat, the adults get a proper mocha and a slice of something, and everyone leaves with a small box for later. The room is small and fills up on weekends; arrive mid-morning if you want a table.

A useful seasonal gift stop when Melbourne visitors are in town and you need something to bring back with you.
